text: Modality doesn't matter; the forced pause does. Forced visual / textual / reflection catch deliberately false claims at indistinguishable rates (7-8/8 each), and no verdict ever sided with a false claim. Even in the visual arm the model grounds its verdict in the tool's numeric metadata, never in a property read off the picture by eye. The corrective work is the required commit-to-a-verdict step, not the modality that satisfies it - visualization is sufficient but not necessary.
